query:
ALTER TABLE `breakoutScans`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `signalType` ENUM('BREAKOUT','RETEST') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BREAKOUT',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `breakoutLevel` DECIMAL(12,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `currentPrice` DECIMAL(12,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `volumeRatio` DECIMAL(8,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `companyName` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `donchian20High` DECIMAL(12,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ema50` DECIMAL(12,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `tier` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `alertSent` TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
